channel.title: Cisco ACI on Christopher Hannan
channel.description: Recent content in Cisco ACI on Christopher Hannan

item.title: ACI - Converting NX-OS to ACI Boot Mode
item.description: Converting to ACI Boot Mode Follow the steps below to convert a Cisco Nexus 9000 Series switch from NX-OS standalone mode to ACI boot mode. 1. Verify which mode the switch is running (ACI or NX-OS) Power on the new switch and connect a console to check if it is running in ACI mode or NX-OS mode. Cisco NX-OS filenames begin with “n9000” while ACI filenames begin with “aci-n9000”: switch# show version 2.

item.title: Basic Commands
item.description: General Overview acidiag fnvread Displays the address and state of switch nodes registered with the fabric. Moquery Usage moquery --help usage: Command line cousin to visore [-h] [-i HOST] [-p PORT] [-d DN] [-c KLASS] [-f FILTER] [-a ATTRS] [-o OUTPUT] [-u USER] [-x [OPTIONS [OPTIONS ...]]] optional arguments: -h, --help show this help message and exit -i HOST, --host HOST Hostname or ip of apic -p PORT, --port PORT REST server port -d DN, --dn DN dn of the mo -c KLASS, --klass KLASS comma seperated class names to query -f FILTER, --filter FILTER property filter to accept/reject mos -a ATTRS, --attrs ATTRS type of attributes to display (config, all) -o OUTPUT, --output OUTPUT Display format (block, table, xml, json) -u USER, --user USER User name -x [OPTIONS [OPTIONS .
